title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 393.300 - Customer bills in Braille or bold-faced type on request
text:
393.300.  Customer bills in Braille or bold-faced type on request. — 1.  Any provider of telephone, sewer, water, electric or gas utility service, whether public or private, shall, upon the request of a customer of such provider, provide the customer's bills in Braille or no less than twenty-four point bold-faced type print or both.
  2.  This section shall become effective on August 28, 1999.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1088 § 393.300, § A) 
Effective 8-28-99
